usecases.title: GST Notice Reply
usecases.description: Draft a formal reply to a GST scrutiny notice for ITC mismatch between GSTR-2A and books, including an extension request and document list.

usecases.title: Advance Tax Note
usecases.description: Prepare a Q3 advance tax computation note for CFO approval with calculation table, payment instructions, and Section 234C consequences.

usecases.title: TDS Compliance Checklist
usecases.description: Create a quarter-end TDS compliance checklist grouped by timing, owner, status, and common errors to avoid.

usecases.title: Income Tax Provision Note
usecases.description: Prepare a Q2 income tax provision note with tax computation, deferred tax, journal entries, and management disclosure notes.

usecases.title: IT SCN Reply and Appeal Grounds
usecases.description: Live demo for drafting a reply to an Income Tax show cause notice under Section 144 and appeal grounds using a detailed dummy scenario.
usecases.folder: UC04B - IT SCN Reply and Appeal Grounds

usecases.title: GST SCN Reply u/s 73-74
usecases.description: Live demo for drafting a GST show cause notice reply involving ITC denial where supplier registration was cancelled retrospectively.

usecases.title: Internal Audit Purchase Checklist
usecases.description: Create a risk-based internal audit checklist for the procure-to-pay cycle, including risks, control tests, procedures, and sampling approach.

usecases.title: Management Representation Letter
usecases.description: Draft a statutory audit management representation letter aligned with SA 580 and Indian audit practice.

usecases.title: Expense Anomaly Review
usecases.description: Review journal entries for duplicate postings, round-number entries, weekend or late-night postings, reversals, and self-approvals.

usecases.title: Payroll Audit Finding
usecases.description: Write a professional internal audit observation for payroll changes processed without dual authorisation.

usecases.title: P&L Commentary Board Report
usecases.description: Produce Q2 P&L commentary for a board pack, covering revenue, margins, EBITDA, PAT, drivers, and management actions.

usecases.title: Vendor Advance Reconciliation
usecases.description: Prepare a vendor advance reconciliation statement, likely causes table, journal entries, and next steps in Indian accounting context.

usecases.title: Month-End Close Checklist
usecases.description: Build a September 2025 month-end close checklist with time-blocked tasks, owners, target dates, and quarter-end items.

usecases.title: MSME Creditor Ageing Report
usecases.description: Prepare creditor ageing with MSME compliance review, overdue alerts, interest estimate, and Directors' Report disclosure.

usecases.title: Regulatory Update Note
usecases.description: Summarise an MCA circular into an executive summary, action table, and board note in plain language.

usecases.title: Related Party Disclosure
usecases.description: Prepare related party transaction disclosures for an annual report under Companies Act and Ind AS 24 requirements.

usecases.title: Board Resolution - Auditor Appointment
usecases.description: Draft a board resolution for statutory auditor appointment with recitals, resolved clauses, authorisation, and signature block.

usecases.title: Compliance Calendar FY26
usecases.description: Create a month-by-month FY2025-26 compliance calendar for TDS, GST, advance tax, ROC, PF, ESI, and Form 16.

usecases.title: Copilot Excel Variance Analysis
usecases.description: Use Copilot in Excel to summarise budget vs actual variance, highlight exceptions, add YTD analysis, and create review outputs.

usecases.title: Travel Expense Policy - Copilot Word
usecases.description: Use Copilot in Word to draft and refine a corporate travel and expense reimbursement policy for an Indian manufacturing company.
usecases.folder: UC18 - Travel Expense Policy Copilot Word

usecases.title: Copilot Outlook Thread Summary
usecases.description: Use Copilot in Outlook to summarise email threads, identify action items, and draft professional follow-up replies.

usecases.title: Copilot PowerPoint from MIS
usecases.description: Use Copilot in PowerPoint to convert an MIS report into a board presentation and refine slides with follow-up prompts.
